expectations.evidence: Opens with clear, concise distinction: Section bundles use _index.md and have children; Leaf bundles use index.md and have no children. Explains when to use each.
Shows practical content/ directory structure with modules as section bundles, lessons as leaf bundles, assignments as leaf bundles
Explains resources stored in bundle directories alongside index.md, accessible via .Resources method, keeps code examples and diagrams with content
Does not mention CSS complexity or Zen theme CSS philosophy
